case_title: ACCOUNTANT INC VS ST. VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIETY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ST. VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIETY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY ACCOUNTANT INC AS TO DEFENDANT ST. VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIETY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ACCOUNTANT INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ST. VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIETY $3,560.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,600.50, LESS $2330.00 IF CHECKS CLEARS BALANCE THEN OWED WILL BE $1230.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
